svg.title: Blue Screen Of Death Omarchy wallpaper
svg.desc: A Windows BSOD-inspired wallpaper for an Omarchy custom theme.

text.tspan: We are grateful to the Blue Screen of Death
It turns out crashing before every deadline was not a feature.
Windows was just doing community outreach for Linux.

text.font-family: JetBrainsMono Nerd Font, Liberation Mono, monospace
text.tspan: For more information about this miracle and possible fixes, remember:
the best Windows recovery tool was installing Linux.

text.font-family: JetBrainsMono Nerd Font, Liberation Mono, monospace
